case_title: MIEKO SAITO VS. SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100005185) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-26-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
OPPOSITION FOR MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAITO, MIEKO

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. ON OCTOBER 26, 2015, PLAINTIFF FILED A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. =(302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302,THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 2, 2015, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 26, 2015, AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EHG
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-02-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is
Off calendar. On October 26, 2015, Plaintiff filed a Request for Dismissal. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to November 2, 2015, to give the opposing the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 26, 2015, at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
